titleStmt.title: SII 26.583: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 583.

summary.p: On a pillar of the maṇḍapa in front of the temple of Sūrēśvara.

p.hi: Śaka 1547, Raktākshi, Māgha śu. 10, Saturday = 1625 A.D., January 8.

summary.p: It states that the temple of Chennakēśava built by Aḍsaṁballi Rāmānāyani, son of Gaṁggapa, grandson of Kaṁchināyani belonging to Āluṭla-gōtra, at Kāremupūṁḍi-paṭṭaṇa called Vuddaṁḍḍa-vīra-tirupati and included in the Viḷāyati-kasaba of Koṇḍavīṭi-sīma belonging to the ijārati of Maṟi Rāmānāyani of Vaṁkāyalapāḍu, who is the mudrakarta of Rāmānāyani, having been dilapidated and the image therein being mutilated got it reconstructed including the prākāra and a similar deity reconsecrated therein along with the āḷvārs and goddess for the worship and food-offerings of which a gift of paddy, ghee, oil, the income from taxes, lands at Kāreṁpūṁḍi originally given by Rāmānāyani, probably by Vīramarāju of Bollēpalli. It also records a grant of sarvamānya lands owned by him, the lands given by the village officers, and other dry and wet lands in several places along with income from taxes on the marriages conducted at Kārēṁpūṁḍi, among communities like Gutta-chaṭṭi, Kōmaṭi and the income from the articles of merchandise to the same deity for the worship and offerings.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Avighnamastu . śubhamastu . śrīrāmā .
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbbulu 1547 A
gunēṭi raktākṣi saṁvyatsara māgha śu 10 śa . Āluṭla gōtrōdbhavulaina ka
ṁcināyaniṁgāri pautṛlaina gaṁggapaṁgāri putṛlaina Aḍsaṁba
lli rāmānāyaniṁgāri mudrakatan® vaṁkkāyalapāṭi ma
ṟi rāmānāyaniṁgāriki Ijāratiki sāgivacci koṁḍavīṭi sī
malōni viḷāyati kasubā vuddaṁḍḍa vīratirupati sthalamaina kā
remupūṁḍi paṭṭaṇamaṁddu vī¨rlavāri purātana pratiṣṭha ceṁnnakēśa
vasvāmula dēvaḷamu paḍipōyi vuṁḍḍaṁgānuṁnnu svāmi
sithilamai vuṁḍḍaṁgānuṁnnu rāmānāyaniṁgāriki śā
śvataiśvaryālu galigēṭaṭṭugānu krotta dēvaḷa prākārālu ga
ṭṭiṁcci purāṇapratiṣitamaina dēvuṁḍu bhiṁnnavigrahaṁganaka ta
tphratirūpamugānu Aśśuvāru Ammavāri tōḍaṭṭu ceṁ
nnakēśava nūtana vigrahapratiṣṭha Ameyabbraṁhma kalpasthāI
gānu śēyiṁccenu . śrī . yīdēvuniki nityapaḍi tara kaiṁkkarya
muṁnnu sakala vi muluṁnnu naḍiciṭaṁddulaku rāmā
nāyaniṁgāri kaṭṭaḍa nityanai vēdyānaku di 1 ki biyyaṁ ma[¢]nnu ne
I ¢1 nnu nūne ¢1 nnu maṟi kaṭṭaḍa di 1 ki biyyaṁ ma¢nnu
nūne ¢1 nnu sthalagaraṇālu di 1 ki nūne ¢1 nnu sīma suṁ
(ṁ)kkalu pu parisaramuṁnnu yidigāka rāmānāyaniṁgā
ru sama¨rppiṁccina velipolaṁ kāreṁpūṁḍini tappeṭakuṁṭṭacē
nuṁnnu Āpaḍamaṭi rēgaṭicēni sthaḷamuṁnnu kha . 1 bollēpalli vīra
marāju yicci tana sarvamānyapu mōrsacēnu vappice¨rla po
limera veṁṭṭanu na 4 nnu grāmadoralu yiccina polaṁ Aḍigoppula
nu yaṟaṁcervulō na 3 nnu naramālapāṭanu kuṁṭṭamuṁdda
nnu Oppice¨rla nu 1¢nnu cina koḍmagūḷḷa parakiṭi cēnu na 1
nnu veṁpakoṁmu pallenu kaṁbbālacēnu na 1 nnu pēṭagrāmāna
nu ciṁtakattuva kiṁdda nīru polaṁ na 2 maḍinni mēḍipallini
na 1¢ vittanāla varimaḍiṁnni kāreṁpūṁḍi pēṭagrāmālanu
yediriṁccina peṁḍliki rūkānu guttacaṭṭi peṁḍliki Aḍḍugā
naṁnnu kōmaṭi peṁḍliki yadiriṁccinaṁdduku ga 1¢ nnu guttaca
ṭṭipeṁḍliki ga ¢ nnu mūlavīsālu kanmanu naḍci vuppugōnelaku 100 ki
l ¢ śīmalō prattikaṁṭlāṁ 1 ki ga 2 dūdicekka kaṁṭlālaku da 3 cillaracavulu
Uppugōnelaku da 2 jnolaRead asjonnola.gōneku da ¢ nuṁnnuThis is incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 26.583 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
